title: Small Uncrewed Aircraft Systems (SUAS) in Divisional Brigades
description: The authors assessed challenges and opportunities related to integrating small uncrewed aircraft systems with electronic warfare capabilities in divisional brigades and identified ways to make XVIII Airborne Corps units more effective in meeting spectrum management challenges.
text:
